title: BOS-bestfit (simple_story, T=512)
description: 4 rows from the standard causal-LM dataloader; row 3 shows multi-doc packing.

title: BOS-bestfit (simple_story, T=2048)
description: Single row at the real training T; multi-doc packing visible across the row.

title: Butterfly / MIM masks (N=16)
description: Five variants: butterfly + naive/perdoc interleave × orig/seq coords. Doc boundaries marked.

title: Multithread-LM dataloader (3-thread wave)
description: Stage-1: per-position inputs/targets for the same 3-thread wave. Within-thread shift-by-1 with <eot> override at non-decision threads' last content; decision's last content predicts <bos>.

title: Multithread-LM generation (3-thread wave)
description: Stage-1 mimic: parent prompt at step 0, <bot-3> at step 1, 3 parallel <sot>s at step 2, siblings decode in lockstep, then the laggard runs alone, then <bos> fires (postpone rule).

title: Multithread-LM masks (mutual vs blind)
description: Stage-1: 3-thread wave (parent=2, children 4/2/2; t2=decision, t0=laggard). Mask-B mutual is the primary design; mask-A blind kept for comparison. Postpone rule visible — <bos> sits at the row end.

title: RoPE — plain / PI×2 / hidden-thinking
description: Three positional schemes on a 10-token sequence. Hidden-thinking variant pins thinking-token k_pos to the parent so later queries see them as co-positioned.
